modules.name: graphics
modules.description: Provides an interface to the user's graphics hardware, as well as having some useful math functions. All coordinates are measured in pixels from the upper-left corner of the screen (y increases downward).

functions.name: draw
functions.signature: love.graphics.draw(drawable, x, y, r, sx, sy, ox, oy, kx, ky)
functions.description: Draws a Drawable object on the screen with optional rotation, scaling and shearing.

parameters.name: drawable
parameters.description: A drawable object such as an Image or Canvas.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The position to draw the object (x-axis). Default: 0

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The position to draw the object (y-axis). Default: 0

parameters.name: r
parameters.description: Orientation (radians). Default: 0

parameters.name: sx
parameters.description: Scale factor (x-axis). Default: 1

parameters.name: sy
parameters.description: Scale factor (y-axis). Default: sx

parameters.name: ox
parameters.description: Origin offset (x-axis). Default: 0

parameters.name: oy
parameters.description: Origin offset (y-axis). Default: 0

parameters.name: kx
parameters.description: Shearing factor (x-axis). Default: 0

parameters.name: ky
parameters.description: Shearing factor (y-axis). Default: 0

functions.name: print
functions.signature: love.graphics.print(text, x, y, r, sx, sy, ox, oy, kx, ky)
functions.description: Draws text on screen using the current font.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The text to draw.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The position to draw the text (x-axis).

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The position to draw the text (y-axis).

parameters.name: r
parameters.description: Orientation (radians). Default: 0

parameters.name: sx
parameters.description: Scale factor (x-axis). Default: 1

parameters.name: sy
parameters.description: Scale factor (y-axis). Default: 1

functions.name: printf
functions.signature: love.graphics.printf(text, x, y, limit, align, r, sx, sy, ox, oy, kx, ky)
functions.description: Draws formatted text with word-wrap.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The text to draw.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The position on the x-axis.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The position on the y-axis.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Wrap the line after this many horizontal pixels.

parameters.name: align
parameters.description: The alignment. Default: 'left'

functions.name: newImage
functions.description: Creates a new Image from a file path.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filepath to the image file (or a FileData, ImageData, or CompressedImageData object).

returns.name: image
returns.description: An Image object which can be drawn on screen.

functions.name: newFont
functions.description: Creates a new Font from a TrueType Font or BMFont file.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filepath to the BMFont or TrueType font file.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the font in pixels. Default: 12

functions.name: newCanvas
functions.description: Creates a new Canvas. Canvases can be used to render to a texture.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: The width of the Canvas. Default: window width

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: The height of the Canvas. Default: window height

parameters.name: settings
parameters.description: Optional table of settings.

returns.name: canvas
returns.description: A new Canvas with specified dimensions.

functions.name: newQuad
functions.signature: quad = love.graphics.newQuad(x, y, width, height, sw, sh)
functions.description: Creates a new Quad. A Quad represents a rectangle on an Image.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The top-left position in the Image along the x-axis.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The top-left position in the Image along the y-axis.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: The width of the Quad in the Image.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: The height of the Quad in the Image.

parameters.name: sw
parameters.description: The reference width (source image width).

parameters.name: sh
parameters.description: The reference height (source image height).

functions.name: newSpriteBatch
functions.description: Creates a new SpriteBatch object.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The Image to use for the sprites.

parameters.name: maxsprites
parameters.description: The maximum number of sprites the SpriteBatch can contain at any given time. Default: 1000

parameters.name: usage
parameters.description: The expected usage of the SpriteBatch. Default: 'dynamic'

functions.name: newParticleSystem
functions.description: Creates a new ParticleSystem.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The image to use.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The max number of particles at the same time. Default: 1000

functions.name: newMesh
functions.description: Creates a new Mesh.

parameters.name: vertices
parameters.description: The table of vertices.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: How the vertices are used when drawing. Default: 'fan'

parameters.name: usage
parameters.description: The expected usage of the Mesh. Default: 'dynamic'

functions.name: newShader
functions.description: Creates a new Shader object for hardware-accelerated vertex and pixel effects.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The pixel shader or vertex shader code, or a filename to a GLSL file.

returns.name: shader
returns.description: A Shader object for use in drawing operations.

functions.name: setColor
functions.description: Sets the color used for drawing. Values are 0-1.

parameters.name: r
parameters.description: The red component (0–1).

parameters.name: g
parameters.description: The green component (0–1).

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: The blue component (0–1).

parameters.name: a
parameters.description: The alpha component (0–1). Default: 1

functions.name: getColor
functions.description: Gets the current color.

functions.name: setBackgroundColor
functions.description: Sets the background color.

parameters.name: r
parameters.description: The red component (0–1).

parameters.name: g
parameters.description: The green component (0–1).

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: The blue component (0–1).

parameters.name: a
parameters.description: The alpha component (0–1). Default: 1

functions.name: clear
functions.description: Clears the screen or active Canvas to the specified color.

parameters.name: r
parameters.description: Red component. Default: background color

parameters.name: g
parameters.description: Green component.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: Blue component.

parameters.name: a
parameters.description: Alpha component. Default: 1

functions.name: present
functions.description: Swaps the buffers and presents the screen. Called automatically by LÖVE at the end of each frame.

functions.name: rectangle
functions.signature: love.graphics.rectangle(mode, x, y, width, height, rx, ry)
functions.description: Draws a rectangle.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: How to draw the rectangle. 'fill' or 'line'.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The position of top-left corner on the x-axis.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The position of top-left corner on the y-axis.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Width of the rectangle.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Height of the rectangle.

parameters.name: rx
parameters.description: The x-axis radius of each round corner. Default: 0

parameters.name: ry
parameters.description: The y-axis radius of each round corner. Default: rx

functions.name: circle
functions.description: Draws a circle.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: How to draw the circle. 'fill' or 'line'.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The position of the center on the x-axis.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The position of the center on the y-axis.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: The radius of the circle.

functions.name: ellipse
functions.description: Draws an ellipse.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: How to draw the ellipse. 'fill' or 'line'.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The position of the center on the x-axis.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The position of the center on the y-axis.

parameters.name: a
parameters.description: The radius of the ellipse along the x-axis.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: The radius of the ellipse along the y-axis.

functions.name: line
functions.description: Draws lines between points.

parameters.name: x1
parameters.description: The x-position of the first point.

parameters.name: y1
parameters.description: The y-position of the first point.

parameters.name: x2
parameters.description: The x-position of the second point.

parameters.name: y2
parameters.description: The y-position of the second point.

functions.name: polygon
functions.description: Draw a polygon.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: How to draw the polygon. 'fill' or 'line'.

parameters.name: vertices
parameters.description: The vertices of the polygon as a table: {x1, y1, x2, y2, ...}

functions.name: arc
functions.signature: love.graphics.arc(mode, x, y, radius, angle1, angle2, segments)
functions.description: Draws an arc.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: How to draw the arc. 'fill' or 'line'.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x-position of the center.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y-position of the center.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: Radius of the arc.

parameters.name: angle1
parameters.description: Start angle of the arc in radians.

parameters.name: angle2
parameters.description: End angle of the arc in radians.

parameters.name: segments
parameters.description: Number of segments used for drawing the arc. Default: 10

functions.name: point
functions.description: Draws a point.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x-position of the point.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y-position of the point.

functions.name: push
functions.description: Copies and pushes the current coordinate transformation to the transformation stack.

parameters.name: stack
parameters.description: The type of stack to push ('transform' or 'all'). Default: 'transform'

functions.name: pop
functions.description: Pops the current transformation from the transformation stack.

functions.name: translate
functions.description: Translates the coordinate system in two dimensions.

parameters.name: dx
parameters.description: The translation relative to the x-axis.

parameters.name: dy
parameters.description: The translation relative to the y-axis.

functions.name: rotate
functions.description: Rotates the coordinate system in two dimensions.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: The amount to rotate the coordinate system in radians.

functions.name: scale
functions.description: Scales the coordinate system in two dimensions.

parameters.name: sx
parameters.description: The scaling in the direction of the x-axis.

parameters.name: sy
parameters.description: The scaling in the direction of the y-axis. Default: sx

functions.name: setCanvas
functions.description: Captures drawing operations to a Canvas.

parameters.name: canvas
parameters.description: The new target Canvas. Pass nil to use the main screen.

functions.name: setShader
functions.description: Sets or resets a Shader as the current pixel effect or vertex shaders.

parameters.name: shader
parameters.description: The Shader to use. Pass nil to reset.

functions.name: setBlendMode
functions.description: Sets the blending mode.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: The blend mode to use.

parameters.name: alphamode
parameters.description: What to do with the alpha of drawn objects. Default: 'alphamultiply'

functions.name: setFont
functions.description: Sets or resets the current Font.

parameters.name: font
parameters.description: The Font object to use.

functions.name: setLineWidth
functions.description: Sets the line width.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: The width of the line in pixels.

functions.name: getDimensions
functions.description: Gets the width and height of the window.

functions.name: getWidth
functions.description: Gets the width of the window.

functions.name: getHeight
functions.description: Gets the height of the window.

functions.name: newText
functions.description: Creates a new drawable Text object.

parameters.name: font
parameters.description: The font to use for the text.

parameters.name: textstring
parameters.description: The initial string of text. Optional.

functions.name: captureScreenshot
functions.description: Gets a screenshot and saves it to a file or passes it to a callback.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filename to save the screenshot to.

modules.name: audio
modules.description: Provides an interface to the user's audio hardware, allowing playback and recording of sounds. Supports static and streaming sources.

functions.name: newSource
functions.description: Creates a new Source from a file or SoundData.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filepath to the audio file (or a File, FileData, SoundData, or Decoder).

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: 'static' loads the entire sound into memory. 'stream' streams it from disk.

returns.name: source
returns.description: A new Source that can play the specified audio.

functions.name: play
functions.description: Plays the specified Source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The Source to play.

functions.name: stop
functions.description: Stops the specified Source(s) from playing.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source to stop. If nil, stops all sources.

functions.name: pause
functions.description: Pauses the given Source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source to pause. If nil, pauses all sources.

functions.name: setVolume
functions.description: Sets the master volume.

parameters.name: volume
parameters.description: 1.0 is max and 0.0 is off.

functions.name: getVolume
functions.description: Gets the master volume.

functions.name: setPosition
functions.description: Sets the position of the listener.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x position of the listener.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y position of the listener.

parameters.name: z
parameters.description: The z position of the listener.

functions.name: getPosition
functions.description: Gets the position of the listener.

returns.name: x
returns.description: The x position of the listener.

functions.name: setDistanceModel
functions.description: Sets the distance attenuation model.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The new distance model.

functions.name: newRecordingDevice
functions.signature: device = love.audio.newRecordingDevice(name, samples, samplerate, bitdepth, channels)
functions.description: Creates a new recording device.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the recording device. Default: default device.

modules.name: filesystem
modules.description: Provides an interface to the user's filesystem. Only files in specific directories can be accessed (save directory, source directory).

functions.name: read
functions.description: Read the contents of a file.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name (and path) of the file.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: How many bytes to read. Default: all

functions.name: write
functions.description: Write data to a file.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name (and path) of the file.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The data to write to the file.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: How many bytes to write. Default: all

functions.name: append
functions.description: Append data to an existing file.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the file to append to.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The data to append to the file.

functions.name: remove
functions.description: Removes a file or empty directory.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The file or directory to remove.

returns.name: success
returns.description: True if the file or directory was removed.

functions.name: getInfo
functions.description: Gets information about the specified file or directory.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The file or directory path.

parameters.name: filtertype
parameters.description: If set, only returns info if the type matches.

returns.name: info
returns.description: A table with fields: type, size, modtime. Nil if path doesn't exist.

functions.name: getDirectoryItems
functions.description: Returns a table with the names of files and subdirectories in the specified path.

parameters.name: dir
parameters.description: The directory.

returns.name: items
returns.description: A sequence of strings with the names of all files and subdirectories.

functions.name: createDirectory
functions.description: Recursively creates a directory.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The directory to create.

returns.name: success
returns.description: True if the directory was created, false if not.

functions.name: getSaveDirectory
functions.description: Gets the path to the designated save directory.

returns.name: path
returns.description: The absolute path to the save directory.

functions.name: getSourceBaseDirectory
functions.description: Returns the full path to the directory containing the .love file or main.lua.

returns.name: path
returns.description: The full path to the directory.

functions.name: load
functions.description: Loads a Lua file and returns it as a function.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name (and path) of the file.

functions.name: lines
functions.description: Iterate over the lines in a file.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name (and path) of the file.

returns.name: iterator
returns.description: A function that iterates over all the lines in the file.

functions.name: exists
functions.description: Check whether a file or directory exists.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filename to check.

returns.name: exists
returns.description: True if there is a file or directory with the specified name.

modules.name: keyboard
modules.description: Provides an interface to the user's keyboard. Key constants are strings like 'a', 'space', 'return', 'left', 'up', 'lshift', etc.

functions.name: isDown
functions.description: Checks whether a certain key is down.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key to check (e.g. 'a', 'space', 'return').

returns.name: down
returns.description: True if the key is down.

functions.name: isScancodeDown
functions.description: Checks whether the specified Scancodes are pressed.

parameters.name: scancode
parameters.description: A Scancode to check.

returns.name: down
returns.description: True if the scancode is down.

functions.name: setKeyRepeat
functions.description: Enables or disables key repeat for love.keypressed. It is disabled by default.

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: True to enable key repeat, false to disable.

functions.name: hasKeyRepeat
functions.description: Gets whether key repeat is enabled.

returns.name: enabled
returns.description: True if key repeat is enabled, false otherwise.

functions.name: getKeyFromScancode
functions.description: Gets the key corresponding to the given hardware scancode.

parameters.name: scancode
parameters.description: The scancode to get the key from.

returns.name: key
returns.description: The key corresponding to the given scancode.

functions.name: setTextInput
functions.description: Enables or disables text input events. It is enabled by default on desktop.

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: Whether text input events should be enabled.

modules.name: mouse
modules.description: Provides an interface to the user's mouse. On mobile, touch events are separate.

functions.name: isDown
functions.description: Checks whether a certain mouse button is down.

parameters.name: button
parameters.description: The index of the button to check. 1=left, 2=right, 3=middle.

returns.name: down
returns.description: True if the specified button is down.

functions.name: getPosition
functions.description: Returns the current position of the mouse.

returns.name: x
returns.description: The position of the mouse along the x-axis.

returns.name: y
returns.description: The position of the mouse along the y-axis.

functions.name: getX
functions.description: Returns the current x-position of the mouse.

returns.name: x
returns.description: The position of the mouse along the x-axis.

functions.name: getY
functions.description: Returns the current y-position of the mouse.

returns.name: y
returns.description: The position of the mouse along the y-axis.

functions.name: setPosition
functions.description: Sets the position of the mouse.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The new position of the mouse along the x-axis.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The new position of the mouse along the y-axis.

functions.name: setVisible
functions.description: Sets the visibility of the cursor.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: True to show the cursor, false to hide it.

functions.name: isVisible
functions.description: Checks if the cursor is visible.

returns.name: visible
returns.description: True if the cursor is visible, false otherwise.

functions.name: setGrabbed
functions.description: Grabs the mouse and disallows it to leave the window.

parameters.name: grab
parameters.description: True to confine the mouse, false to let it leave.

functions.name: newCursor
functions.description: Creates a new hardware Cursor object from an image.

parameters.name: imageData
parameters.description: The ImageData to use for the cursor.

parameters.name: hotx
parameters.description: The x-coordinate of the cursor's hot spot. Default: 0

parameters.name: hoty
parameters.description: The y-coordinate of the cursor's hot spot. Default: 0

functions.name: setCursor
functions.description: Sets the current mouse cursor.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: The Cursor object to use. Pass nil to reset to default.

modules.name: math
modules.description: Provides system-independent mathematical functions. Supplements the standard Lua math library.

functions.name: random
functions.description: Generates a pseudo-random number. Better than Lua's math.random as it uses a higher quality generator.

parameters.name: m
parameters.description: If only m is given, returns integer in [1, m]. If m and n, returns integer in [m, n]. If none, returns float in [0, 1).

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: Upper limit (inclusive).

functions.name: randomNormal
functions.description: Generates a normally distributed pseudo-random number.

parameters.name: stddev
parameters.description: Standard deviation of the distribution. Default: 1

parameters.name: mean
parameters.description: Mean of the distribution. Default: 0

functions.name: setRandomSeed
functions.description: Sets the seed of the random number generator.

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: The integer number with which to seed the random number generator.

functions.name: noise
functions.description: Generates a simplex or Perlin noise value in 1-4 dimensions.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The number used to generate the noise value.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The second number. Optional.

parameters.name: z
parameters.description: The third number. Optional.

parameters.name: w
parameters.description: The fourth number. Optional.

returns.name: value
returns.description: The noise value in the range of [0, 1].

functions.name: newBezierCurve
functions.description: Creates a new BezierCurve object.

parameters.name: vertices
parameters.description: The vertices of the control polygon as a table: {x1, y1, x2, y2, ...}

functions.name: newTransform
functions.signature: transform = love.math.newTransform(x, y, angle, sx, sy, ox, oy, kx, ky)
functions.description: Creates a new Transform object.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The position of the new Transform on the x-axis.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The position on the y-axis.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: The orientation of the Transform in radians. Default: 0

functions.name: triangulate
functions.description: Triangulates a simple polygon.

parameters.name: polygon
parameters.description: Polygon to triangulate. Must be a simple polygon.

returns.name: triangles
returns.description: List of triangles the polygon is composed of.

functions.name: isConvex
functions.description: Checks whether a polygon is convex.

parameters.name: vertices
parameters.description: The vertices of the polygon as a table.

returns.name: convex
returns.description: Whether the given polygon is convex.

functions.name: gammaToLinear
functions.signature: lr, lg, lb = love.math.gammaToLinear(r, g, b)
functions.description: Converts a color from gamma-space (sRGB) to linear-space.

parameters.name: r
parameters.description: The red channel in gamma-space.

parameters.name: g
parameters.description: The green channel.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: The blue channel.

modules.name: timer
modules.description: Provides functionality related to time. Allows you to get the delta time and FPS, as well as sleep.

functions.name: getDelta
functions.description: Returns the time between the last two frames.

functions.name: getFPS
functions.description: Returns the current frames per second.

functions.name: getTime
functions.description: Returns the value of a timer with an unspecified starting time. Useful for comparing time differences.

functions.name: sleep
functions.description: Pauses the current thread for the specified amount of time.

parameters.name: s
parameters.description: Seconds to sleep for.

functions.name: step
functions.description: Measures the time between two calls to this function.

functions.name: getAverageDelta
functions.description: Returns the average delta time over the last second.

returns.name: delta
returns.description: The average delta time over the last second.

modules.name: window
modules.description: Provides an interface to the program's window. Allows you to modify the window's title, size, visibility, and more.

functions.name: setTitle
functions.description: Sets the window title.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: The new window title.

functions.name: getTitle
functions.description: Gets the window title.

functions.name: setMode
functions.description: Sets the window display mode and properties.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Window width.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Window height.

parameters.name: flags
parameters.description: Table with flags: fullscreen, resizable, borderless, vsync, msaa, etc.

functions.name: getMode
functions.description: Gets the display mode and properties of the window.

functions.name: getDimensions
functions.description: Gets the width and height of the window.

functions.name: setFullscreen
functions.description: Enters or exits fullscreen mode.

parameters.name: fullscreen
parameters.description: Whether to enter or exit fullscreen mode.

parameters.name: fstype
parameters.description: 'exclusive' or 'desktop'. Default: 'desktop'

returns.name: success
returns.description: True if an attempt to set the window's fullscreen mode was successful.

functions.name: isFullscreen
functions.description: Gets whether the window is fullscreen.

returns.name: fullscreen
returns.description: True if the window is fullscreen, false otherwise.

returns.name: fstype
returns.description: The type of fullscreen mode used.

functions.name: setVSync
functions.description: Sets the display mode's vsync setting.

parameters.name: vsync
parameters.description: 1 to enable vsync, 0 to disable, -1 for adaptive.

functions.name: maximize
functions.description: Makes the window as large as possible.

functions.name: minimize
functions.description: Minimizes the window to the system's task bar / dock.

functions.name: restore
functions.description: Restores the size and position of the window if it was minimized or maximized.

functions.name: requestAttention
functions.description: Sets the window's taskbar icon to flash if it is not focused.

parameters.name: continuous
parameters.description: Whether to continuously flash/bounce the window until it is focused. Default: false

modules.name: physics
modules.description: Provides an interface to the Box2D physics engine. All physics bodies exist in a 'World' with a gravity setting.

functions.name: newWorld
functions.description: Creates a new World.

parameters.name: xg
parameters.description: The x component of gravity. Default: 0

parameters.name: yg
parameters.description: The y component of gravity. Default: 0

parameters.name: sleep
parameters.description: Whether the world allows sleep. Default: true

functions.name: newBody
functions.description: Creates a new Body.

parameters.name: world
parameters.description: The world to create the body in.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x position of the body. Default: 0

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y position of the body. Default: 0

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: 'static', 'dynamic', or 'kinematic'. Default: 'static'

functions.name: newFixture
functions.description: Creates and attaches a Fixture to a body.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The body which gets the fixture attached.

parameters.name: shape
parameters.description: The shape of the fixture.

parameters.name: density
parameters.description: The density of the fixture. Default: 1

functions.name: newRectangleShape
functions.description: Creates a rectangle shape.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: The width of the rectangle.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: The height of the rectangle.

functions.name: newCircleShape
functions.description: Creates a circle shape.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: The radius of the circle.

functions.name: newPolygonShape
functions.description: Creates a polygon shape. The vertices must be convex with a counter-clockwise winding.

parameters.name: x1
parameters.description: The x position of the first vertex.

parameters.name: y1
parameters.description: The y position of the first vertex.

functions.name: newEdgeShape
functions.description: Creates an edge shape.

parameters.name: x1
parameters.description: The x position of the first point.

parameters.name: y1
parameters.description: The y position of the first point.

parameters.name: x2
parameters.description: The x position of the second point.

parameters.name: y2
parameters.description: The y position of the second point.

functions.name: newDistanceJoint
functions.signature: joint = love.physics.newDistanceJoint(body1, body2, x1, y1, x2, y2, collideConnected)
functions.description: Creates a DistanceJoint between two bodies.

parameters.name: body1
parameters.description: The first body to attach to the joint.

parameters.name: body2
parameters.description: The second body to attach to the joint.

parameters.name: x1
parameters.description: The x position of the first anchor point (world coordinates).

parameters.name: y1
parameters.description: The y position of the first anchor point.

parameters.name: x2
parameters.description: The x position of the second anchor point.

parameters.name: y2
parameters.description: The y position of the second anchor point.

functions.name: newRevoluteJoint
functions.signature: joint = love.physics.newRevoluteJoint(body1, body2, x, y, collideConnected, referenceAngle)
functions.description: Creates a joint between two bodies which allows them to revolve around their common anchor point.

parameters.name: body1
parameters.description: The first body.

parameters.name: body2
parameters.description: The second body.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x position of the connecting point (world coordinates).

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y position of the connecting point.

functions.name: setMeter
functions.description: Sets the pixels-per-meter scale factor. Default is 30.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: The number of pixels that represents 1 meter.

modules.name: system
modules.description: Provides access to information about the user's system.

functions.name: getOS
functions.description: Gets the current operating system.

functions.name: getProcessorCount
functions.description: Gets the number of CPU cores in the system.

returns.name: cores
returns.description: Gets the amount of logical CPU cores.

functions.name: getClipboardText
functions.description: Gets text from the clipboard.

returns.name: text
returns.description: The text currently held in the system's clipboard.

functions.name: setClipboardText
functions.description: Puts text in the clipboard.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The new text to hold in the system's clipboard.

functions.name: openURL
functions.description: Opens a URL with the user's web or file browser.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL to open. Must be formatted as a proper URL.

returns.name: success
returns.description: True if the URL was successfully opened.

functions.name: vibrate
functions.description: Causes the device to vibrate (mobile only).

parameters.name: seconds
parameters.description: The duration to vibrate. Default: 0.5

modules.name: event
modules.description: Manages events, like keypresses. Allows you to push and poll custom events.

functions.name: quit
functions.description: Adds the quit event to the queue. Causes the program to exit.

parameters.name: exitstatus
parameters.description: The exit code. Default: 0

functions.name: push
functions.description: Adds an event to the event queue.

parameters.name: e
parameters.description: The name of the event.

parameters.name: a
parameters.description: First event argument. Optional.

functions.name: pump
functions.description: Pumps events into the event queue, called automatically by LÖVE.

functions.name: poll
functions.signature: e, a, b, c, d, f = love.event.poll()
functions.description: Returns an iterator for messages in the event queue.

functions.name: wait
functions.signature: e, a, b, c, d, f = love.event.wait()
functions.description: Like poll but blocks until there is an event in the queue.

modules.name: joystick
modules.description: Provides an interface to connected joysticks and gamepads.

functions.name: getJoysticks
functions.description: Gets a list of connected Joysticks.

returns.name: joysticks
returns.description: The list of currently connected Joysticks.

functions.name: getJoystickCount
functions.description: Gets the number of connected joysticks.

functions.name: loadGamepadMappings
functions.description: Loads a gamepad mapping string or file.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filename to load the mappings from.

functions.name: saveGamepadMappings
functions.description: Saves the virtual gamepad mappings to a file.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filename to save to.

modules.name: touch
modules.description: Provides an interface to touch-screen presses on mobile devices.

functions.name: getTouches
functions.description: Gets a list of active touches.

returns.name: touches
returns.description: A list of active touch IDs.

functions.name: getPosition
functions.description: Gets the position of a specified touch-press.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier of the touch-press.

functions.name: getPressure
functions.description: Gets the current pressure of a touch-press.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier of the touch-press.

modules.name: video
modules.description: Provides an interface to decode and play back videos.

functions.name: newVideoStream
functions.description: Creates a new VideoStream.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filepath to the video file.

callbacks.name: load
callbacks.description: Called once at the start of the game. Used for initialization: loading images, creating objects, setting defaults.

parameters.name: arg
parameters.description: Command-line arguments (filtered).

parameters.name: unfilteredArg
parameters.description: Command-line arguments (unfiltered).

callbacks.name: update
callbacks.description: Called every frame. Update your game state here.

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Time since the last update in seconds.

callbacks.name: draw
callbacks.description: Called every frame after update. Draw everything here.

callbacks.name: quit
callbacks.description: Called when the game is requested to quit. Return true to abort the quit.

callbacks.name: keypressed
callbacks.description: Called when a key is pressed.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key that was pressed.

parameters.name: scancode
parameters.description: The hardware scancode of the key.

parameters.name: isrepeat
parameters.description: Whether this is a key-repeat event.

callbacks.name: keyreleased
callbacks.description: Called when a key is released.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key that was released.

parameters.name: scancode
parameters.description: The hardware scancode.

callbacks.name: textinput
callbacks.description: Called when text is typed. Use this instead of keypressed for text input.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The UTF-8 encoded unicode text.

callbacks.name: mousepressed
callbacks.description: Called when a mouse button is pressed.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Mouse x position.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Mouse y position.

parameters.name: button
parameters.description: Mouse button index (1=left, 2=right, 3=middle).

parameters.name: istouch
parameters.description: Whether this was a touch event.

parameters.name: presses
parameters.description: Number of presses in quick succession.

callbacks.name: mousereleased
callbacks.description: Called when a mouse button is released.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Mouse x position.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Mouse y position.

parameters.name: button
parameters.description: Mouse button index.

callbacks.name: mousemoved
callbacks.description: Called when the mouse is moved.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Mouse x position.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Mouse y position.

parameters.name: dx
parameters.description: Amount moved on x-axis.

parameters.name: dy
parameters.description: Amount moved on y-axis.

callbacks.name: wheelmoved
callbacks.description: Called when the mouse wheel is moved.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Amount of horizontal scroll. Positive is right.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Amount of vertical scroll. Positive is up.

callbacks.name: touchpressed
callbacks.signature: love.touchpressed(id, x, y, dx, dy, pressure)
callbacks.description: Called when a touch press begins.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier of the touch.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x position of the touch.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y position of the touch.

parameters.name: pressure
parameters.description: The amount of pressure (0–1).

callbacks.name: touchreleased
callbacks.signature: love.touchreleased(id, x, y, dx, dy, pressure)
callbacks.description: Called when a touch press ends.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier of the touch.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x position.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y position.

callbacks.name: touchmoved
callbacks.signature: love.touchmoved(id, x, y, dx, dy, pressure)
callbacks.description: Called when a touch press moves.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier of the touch.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The new x position.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The new y position.

parameters.name: dx
parameters.description: Change in x.

parameters.name: dy
parameters.description: Change in y.

callbacks.name: resize
callbacks.description: Called when the window is resized.

parameters.name: w
parameters.description: The new width.

parameters.name: h
parameters.description: The new height.

callbacks.name: focus
callbacks.description: Called when the window gains or loses keyboard focus.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: True if the window gained focus, false otherwise.

callbacks.name: visible
callbacks.description: Called when the window is shown or hidden.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: True if the window is visible, false otherwise.

callbacks.name: joystickpressed
callbacks.description: Called when a joystick button is pressed.

parameters.name: joystick
parameters.description: The joystick object.

parameters.name: button
parameters.description: The button number.

callbacks.name: joystickreleased
callbacks.description: Called when a joystick button is released.

parameters.name: joystick
parameters.description: The joystick object.

parameters.name: button
parameters.description: The button number.

callbacks.name: gamepadpressed
callbacks.description: Called when a gamepad button is pressed.

parameters.name: joystick
parameters.description: The joystick object.

parameters.name: button
parameters.description: The gamepad button constant.

callbacks.name: gamepadreleased
callbacks.description: Called when a gamepad button is released.

parameters.name: joystick
parameters.description: The joystick object.

parameters.name: button
parameters.description: The gamepad button constant.

callbacks.name: errhand
callbacks.description: Called when an unhandled error occurs. The default handler prints the error and shows a traceback.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: The error message.

callbacks.name: threaderror
callbacks.description: Called when a Thread encounters an error.

parameters.name: thread
parameters.description: The thread which produced the error.

parameters.name: errorstr
parameters.description: The error message.
